_comment: AI providers for J103 (admin AI journey) — productive bundle. API keys resolved from env vars at seed time (never committed). gemini-direct is the active default provider.

providers.name: gemini-direct
providers.description: Google Gemini API — proveedor activo por defecto. Modelos: gemini-2.5-flash, gemini-2.5-flash-lite, gemini-embedding-001.

providers.name: openai-direct
providers.description: OpenAI API — proveedor inactivo (starter set verificación). Modelos: gpt-4o-mini, text-embedding-3-small.

providers.name: litellm-local
providers.description: LiteLLM proxy local — placeholder hasta P02-S05. Inactivo en verificación inicial.
